patient_summary: Olivia, female, age 73 (DOB recorded primarily as 05/05/1952) has documented mixed dyslipidemia and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes, essential hypertension, and multiple anemia entries (postoperative and unspecified). Notable laboratory results from 07/03/2023 include ferritin 266.8 ng/mL (H), iron 41 ug/dL (L), iron saturation 15% (L), triglycerides 158 mg/dL (H), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 ml/min/1.73m2 (L), and TSH 1.320 mIU/mL. A colonoscopy with biopsy was scheduled for 02/21/2025 (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Active care team members span primary care, cardiology, endocrinology, and pulmonary specialties. Functional assessments document difficulty walking; ADLs are variably recorded. Multiple demographic and social-history discrepancies (DOB, legal sex, tobacco use) are present across source documents and are preserved in conflicts for reconciliation.
